demographics.living_situation: lives with adult daughter present overnight

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I've been getting more and more breathless over the years, but tonight I can't catch my breath at all and I just coughed up some pink spit.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Long-standing breathlessness has suddenly become much worse tonight with breathlessness at rest, and she has just coughed up pink, blood-tinged spit.

symptom_narrative.onset: breathlessness has crept up over many years, but tonight it came on badly and suddenly
symptom_narrative.duration: decades of gradual exertional breathlessness, sharply worse over the last 48 hours
symptom_narrative.character: breathless, gasping and unable to catch her breath; a cough that brought up pink, blood-tinged spit after a coughing fit
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: so breathless she can barely finish a sentence without stopping for breath
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: in her chest and breathing; feels like she cannot get enough air
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: much worse tonight and when lying down; needs several pillows and feels she is drowning if she lies flat
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: sitting bolt upright helps a little
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: lying flat and any exertion make it much worse
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: very tired and drained, and a feeling of a fast, irregular, thumping heartbeat over the last few days; coughed up pink-tinged spit tonight
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: has been slowly getting more breathless on exertion for years but never this bad; mentions she had rheumatic fever as a child
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: highly limited tonight - struggling to speak in full sentences and cannot walk without severe breathlessness

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: had rheumatic fever as a child
past_medical_history.how_managed: years ago; not on any specific treatment for it now

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: a long-term water tablet (diuretic), low dose

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: her adult daughter is staying overnight to keep an eye on her

objective_data_offered.value: sitting bolt upright, visibly struggling to breathe and using her shoulders to breathe; a reddish-purple flush over both cheeks
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: observed by the daughter over video; not a clinician examination
